sentences.target: Die Ware ist leider schon ausverkauft.

translations.de: Die Ware ist leider schon ausverkauft.
translations.en: The goods are unfortunately already sold out.
translations.fr: Malheureusement, il n'y en a plus.
translations.zh-Hans: 很遗憾，商品已经售罄了。
translations.pt: Infelizmente, o produto já está esgotado.
translations.hi: दुर्भाग्य से सामान पहले ही खत्म हो चुका है.
translations.el: Δυστυχώς, το προϊόν έχει ήδη εξαντληθεί.
translations.ro: Din păcate, produsul este deja epuizat.
translations.ja: 残念ながら、商品はすでに売り切れです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative, marking the subject noun ‘Ware’.
Common noun; head of the subject NP, feminine nominative singular.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular present, linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Stance adverb expressing regret; modifies the clause.
Temporal adverb; indicates that the state holds already.
Predicative adjective (from the past participle of ‘ausverkaufen’); complements the copula ‘ist’.

sentences.target: Ich prüfe die Ware vor dem Versand.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈpyːfə diː ˈvaːʁə foːɐ̯ deːm fɛɐ̯ˈzant/

translations.de: Ich prüfe die Ware vor dem Versand.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈpyːfə diː ˈvaːʁə foːɐ̯ deːm fɛɐ̯ˈzant/
translations.en: I check the goods before shipping.
translations.es: Reviso los productos antes de enviarlos.
translations.fr: Je vérifie les articles avant l'expédition.
translations.it: Controllo la merce prima della spedizione.
translations.yue: 我會喺出貨前檢查貨品。
translations.pt: Verifico os produtos antes do envio.
translations.he: אני בודק את הסחורה לפני המשלוח.
translations.vi: Tôi kiểm tra hàng trước khi gửi đi.
translations.nl: Ik controleer de producten voor verzending.
translations.hu: A feladás előtt ellenőrzöm az árut.
translations.hi: मैं भेजने से पहले सामान की जांच करता हूँ.
translations.el: Ελέγχω τα προϊόντα πριν την αποστολή.
translations.ja: 出荷前に商品を確認します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative, subject of the clause.
Main verb; 1st person singular present indicative.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative, marking the direct object ‘Ware’.
Common noun; direct object, feminine accusative singular.
Preposition; governs dative, introducing the temporal PP ‘vor dem Versand’.
Definite article; dative singular (masculine here with ‘Versand’), inside the PP headed by ‘vor’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘vor’ in the dative; denotes dispatch/shipping.

sentences.target: Heute kommt die Ware verspätet an.

translations.de: Heute kommt die Ware verspätet an.
translations.en: The goods are arriving late today.
translations.es: Hoy la mercancía llegará con retraso.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, la marchandise arrive en retard.
translations.it: Oggi la merce arriverà in ritardo.
translations.pt: Hoje a mercadoria vai chegar atrasada.
translations.vi: Hôm nay hàng sẽ đến muộn.
translations.nl: Vandaag komt de levering laat aan.
translations.el: Σήμερα τα προϊόντα θα φτάσουν με καθυστέρηση.
translations.id: Hari ini barang akan datang terlambat.
translations.ro: Astăzi marfa va ajunge cu întârziere.
translations.ja: 今日は商品の到着が遅れます。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb; clause-level frame setter.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present of the separable verb ‘ankommen’ (to arrive). Linked with the particle ‘an’ via compound_id.
Definite article; feminine singular nominative marking the subject ‘Ware’.
Common noun; subject, feminine nominative singular; occurs postverbally due to verb-first structure.
Adverb meaning ‘late/delayed’; modifies the arrival event.
Separable verb particle completing ‘ankommen’; forms the verb with ‘kommt’.

sentences.target: Die Ware hat kleine Kratzer am Rand.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈvaːʁə hat ˈklaɪ̯nə ˈkʁatsɐ am ʁant/

translations.de: Die Ware hat kleine Kratzer am Rand.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈvaːʁə hat ˈklaɪ̯nə ˈkʁatsɐ am ʁant/
translations.en: The goods have small scratches on the edge.
translations.es: El producto tiene pequeños arañazos en el borde.
translations.fr: L'article a de petites rayures sur le bord.
translations.it: Il prodotto ha piccoli graffi sul bordo.
translations.ru: На краю товара есть небольшие царапины.
translations.pt: O produto tem pequenos arranhões na borda.
translations.vi: Sản phẩm có vết xước nhỏ ở viền.
translations.ar: يوجد خدوش صغيرة على حافة المنتج.
translations.nl: Het product heeft kleine krasjes aan de rand.
translations.uk: На краю товару є невеликі подряпини.
translations.hu: A termék szélén apró karcok vannak.
translations.hi: सामान के किनारे पर छोटी खरोंचें हैं.
translations.pl: Produkt ma małe rysy na krawędzi.
translations.el: Το προϊόν έχει μικρές γρατζουνιές στην άκρη.
translations.nb: Varen har små riper langs kanten.
translations.id: Barang memiliki goresan kecil di tepi.
translations.sv: Produkten har små repor i kanten.
translations.ro: Produsul are zgârieturi mici pe margine.
translations.cs: Zboží má drobné škrábance na okraji.
translations.da: Varen har små ridser langs kanten.
translations.ja: 商品の縁に小さな傷があります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative marking the subject ‘Ware’.
Common noun; subject, feminine nominative singular.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present, expressing possession.
Attributive adjective; plural inflected, modifying ‘Kratzer’.
Common noun; plural direct object of ‘hat’.
Preposition contracted with the article (‘an dem’ → ‘am’); introduces a dative PP indicating location.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘am’ in the dative; denotes the edge.
